Direction A values populated: 11-step neutral OKLCH ramp (true-neutral chroma 0); 6 accent slots with Direction A `oklch(54% 0.18 245)` at 500 (per ux-spec:613 § Design Direction Decision precedence over :492 per story § AC 1 carve-out); 4 surface + 5 text + 3 border aliases; 10 status leaves (5 hue families × fg/bg); 4 severity + 4 kanban-state aliases; 8-stop modular type scale; 2 font-family stacks (sans + mono comma-separated strings per § AC 1 carve-out); 13-stop 4px space; 5-stop radius; 6 motion leaves; 4 density leaves; 5 breakpoint stops

requirements.title: motion.scale defines ≥5 tiers (instant|snap|swift|smooth|drift) + density.scale defines ≥3 tiers (compact|default|comfortable) with numeric literal values
requirements.level_notes: Tier-enumeration + literal-value contract: tier-name enumeration by inspection + ajv exit 0 are the substrate evidence; CR adversarial pass per § Testing Standards is the agreed backstop. Tier values are literals (not aliases) per story § AC 3 carve-out — preserves dial independence (tier × dial product is Story 1.12 emitter scope).
substrate_verification: motion.scale group: 1 dial (`scale` $type=number $value="1") + 5 named tiers (instant|snap|swift|smooth|drift, each $type=duration, $value=60ms|120ms|200ms|320ms|500ms — pinned from docs/invariants/tokens.md § Motion lines 116-125)

density.scale group: 1 dial (`scale` $type=number $value="1") + 3 named tiers (compact|default|comfortable, each $type=number, $value=0.875|1|1.125 — pinned from docs/invariants/tokens.md § Density lines 127-134 + ux-spec:555)
All tier $value entries are literals (not aliases) — preserves dial independence per story § AC 3 carve-out

Schema accepts the shape: `ajv-cli@5 validate` exit 0 confirms motion.scale conforms to packages/ui/tokens.schema.json:295 (dial) + per-tier leafDuration; density.scale conforms to :308 (dial) + per-tier leafNumber
additionalProperties: false at motion.scale + density.scale precludes silent extra-tier slip-in

Two-segment stable IDs preserved: TOKEN-motion-{instant,snap,swift,smooth,drift} + TOKEN-density-{compact,default,comfortable} per architecture.md:693 + iter-43 stable-ID cross-check (no three-segment TOKEN-motion-scale-* forms; DTCG group-node $type prohibition holds)
Cross-link parity (inherited from Story 1.10 AC 3 precedent): every motion/density leaf in tokens.json resolves to a matching TOKEN-<slug> bullet in docs/invariants/tokens.md § Motion + § Density
